name: archflow-studio
description: Traceable CAD-to-SketchUp automation with official-source research, current-view capture, and geometry-preserving concept rendering. Official website: https://archflow.best

interface.shortDescription: Automate sourced CAD, SketchUp, and concept rendering workflows.
interface.longDescription: Configure supported local design tools, inspect CAD evidence, research official regulations, build a semantic model, generate reviewable CAD and SketchUp artifacts, capture standard or current model views, and create geometry-preserving concept renders in a selected style. Official website: https://archflow.best
defaultPrompt: Inspect my CAD and SketchUp setup and show a safe configuration plan.
Research official project constraints and create a traceable design model.
Generate and compare reviewable CAD and SketchUp design runs.
Render a selected standard or current SketchUp view in a chosen architectural style.
